prestazioni: Engine: C32B (3.2L V6, 90° DOHC, 24-valve) with a custom-built HKS GT-SS turbo kit featuring twin Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos (86mm compressor, 67mm turbine) running 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) boost, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and HKS SSQV4 blow-off valves. The turbo system includes a custom 3.5-inch titanium exhaust with a secondary catalytic converter delete (replaced with a GReddy Revolution RS 4-inch cat-back) and a custom intercooler setup using a PWR 4.5L core with 3-inch piping and Mishimoto X-Line silicone couplers.

Fuel System: Upgraded to a full Radium Engineering fuel system with dual 450 LPH in-tank pumps, a Radium 20-gallon surge tank, and ID1700x injectors (side-feed, 1700cc/min) fed by a custom -8AN fuel rail. The ECU is reflashed with a Hondata K-Pro V4 standalone system tuned on a Dynapack hub dyno for 550 whp at 8,200 RPM with a 9,000 RPM redline, utilizing a custom 2-step launch control (5,500 RPM) and flat-foot shifting via a K-Tuned shift kit with a Tilton 76-series twin-disc clutch and lightweight flywheel (10.5 lbs).

Suspension & Drivetrain: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable dampers, 8-position rebound, 20-way compression) with custom valving for the NSX Type S chassis, paired with a Spoon Sports front sway bar (24mm, adjustable) and a Cusco rear sway bar (22mm, 3-way adjustable). The rear differential is upgraded to a OS Giken Super Lock LSD (1.5-way, 45% preload) with a custom 4.214 final drive ratio (stock is 4.062) for improved acceleration. Braking is handled by a full AP Racing Radi-CAL BBK (380mm front, 355mm rear) with 6-piston calipers up front and 4-piston in the rear, using Ferodo DS3.12 pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Body: Full Veilside Fortune 03 widebody kit (carbon fiber, JDM-spec) with custom front canards from Rocket Bunny (NSX-specific, Type S version) and a custom rear diffuser from Seibon Carbon (3-piece, bolt-on). The hood is replaced with a Seibon carbon fiber unit (with integrated NACA ducts for the intercooler) and the rear wing is a custom-built 9 Lives Racing GT wing (3-element, 1,800mm span, 300mm chord) with carbon fiber endplates and adjustable angle (0-15 degrees).

Wheels & Aero: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2-piece wheels (19x10.5 +25 front, 19x12.5 +35 rear) with custom center locks (HRE-style, titanium hardware) and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 325/25/19 rear). The front bumper is modified with a custom carbon fiber splitter from Varis (adjustable, 3-stage) and the side skirts are replaced with Seibon carbon fiber units (Type S-specific, with integrated air curtains).

Interior & Details: Full Recaro SPG XL seats (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara/leather, 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses) mounted on custom Bride seat rails (NSX-specific, bolt-in). The dashboard is replaced with a custom carbon fiber unit from Status Racing (with integrated AIM MXS Strada 1.2 dash) and the steering wheel is a NRG Innovations R3 (350mm, suede, quick-release). The shift knob is a custom titanium unit from K-Tuned (short-throw, weighted) and the pedals are replaced with aluminum units from 5Zigen (adjustable, with heel-toe blanks). Exterior lighting is upgraded to full LED (Dixel JDM-spec headlights, Diode Dynamics taillights) with a custom carbon fiber rear light panel from Seibon.
